registration_note: Committed before production execution. Padding factors, cadence multipliers, integer-cycle tide windows, other record windows, 5% grid/cadence tolerance, 10% window-stability tolerance, exact UTC storm windows and the no-interpolation rule are fixed. Zero padding samples the finite-record DTFT and creates no temporal information. The initial pending registration used a mistyped non-integer 7/14-day tide duration; it was corrected before any production execution. E006, E008, E010 and the Helgoland experiments remain unchanged until this audit determines whether a versioned update is required.
